hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name'); TARGET=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $TOOL: $TARGET" >> .claude/audit.log
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Capsule"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

TRANSCRIPT_DIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/-Users-denysbohatyrchuk-projects-capsule"; LATEST=$(ls -t "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR"/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$LATEST" ] && exit 0; TOTALS=$(cat "$LATEST" | jq -s '[.[] | select(.message.usage != null) | .message.usage] | {input: ([.[].input_tokens] | add // 0), output: ([.[].output_tokens] | add // 0), cache_read: ([.[].cache_read_input_tokens] | add // 0), cache_created: ([.[].cache_creation_input_tokens] | add // 0)}'); IN=$(echo "$TOTALS" | jq '.input'); OUT=$(echo "$TOTALS" | jq '.output'); CR=$(echo "$TOTALS" | jq '.cache_read'); CC=$(echo "$TOTALS" | jq '.cache_created'); echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] TOKENS session-total — in:$IN out:$OUT cache_read:$CR cache_created:$CC" >> .claude/audit.log
